suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify feature description: change 'alphanumeric codes with hyphens' to 'numeric codes with hyphens' since the regex only accepts digits and hyphens, not full alphanumeric including letters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-coa-form-validation description states 'accept alphanumeric codes with hyphens' but regex `/^[0-9]+(-[0-9]+)*$/` only matches digits and hyphens.
